name: 07 — Text-to-Video Generation (Claude prompt → ComfyUI → MinIO → AFFiNE)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ {"model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 600, "system": "You are a video generation prompt engineer for Wan2.2. Expand the user's brief description into a detailed, cinematic generation prompt. Return JSON only: {\"positive_prompt\": string, \"negative_prompt\": string}", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Brief: " + $json.prompt + "\nStyle: " + ($json.style || 'cinematic') + "\nDuration: " + ($json.duration_seconds || 5) + " seconds"}]} }}

={{ {"title": "Video: " + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.original_brief.substring(0, 60), "content": "## Generated Video

**Brief:** " + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.original_brief + "

**Positive prompt:**
" + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.positive_prompt + "

**Settings:** " + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.width + "x" + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.height + " · " + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.num_frames + " frames

**Project:** " + $('Build ComfyUI Params').item.json.project + "

**File:** " + $('Check if Done').item.json.filename} }}

meta.description: POST to /webhook/generate-video with {prompt, style, duration_seconds, resolution, project}. Claude expands prompt → ComfyUI generates with Wan2.2 → downloads video → logs to AFFiNE.
meta.usage: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/generate-video -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"prompt": "a cat surfing at sunset", "style": "cinematic", "duration_seconds": 5, "project": "MyApp"}'
